steps.title: Interpret each term in the equation
steps.content:
The equation $4x + 3y = 24$ describes Mario's purchases. Breaking down the left side:

$4x$ = 4 binders × $x$ dollars per binder = total binder cost
$3y$ = 3 notebooks × $y$ dollars per notebook = total notebook cost

Adding them together: $4x + 3y$ = total cost of all binders + total cost of all notebooks = total purchase cost

steps.title: Identify what 24 represents
steps.content: Since $4x + 3y = 24$, the sum of all costs equals 24. Therefore, 24 represents the total cost in dollars for all items Mario purchased—both the binders and the notebooks. That matches choice C—C is correct.
